name: iwac-mcp-server
description: Read-only access to the Islam West Africa Collection via Hugging Face datasets.
long_description:
Search and analyse the Islam West Africa Collection (IWAC): ~12,000 newspaper articles, 1,500 Islamic publications (searchable by keyword, subject, series, and table of contents), 4,700 index entries, plus audiovisual materials, archival documents, and academic references. Includes AI sentiment analysis (Gemini polarity/centrality) and per-article AI abstracts. All matching is accent- and case-insensitive.

**No API key is required for the 22 core tools** (keyword search, filtering, statistics, item details). Two optional semantic-search tools use Gemini embeddings — covering all articles and the publication series with tables of contents — and need a free Google/Gemini API key; these are disabled by default.

On first use the server downloads ~250 MB of parquet data from Hugging Face into a local cache.

tools.name: search_articles
tools.description: Search newspaper articles by French keyword (title, OCR, AI abstract), country, newspaper, subject, and date range.

tools.name: get_article
tools.description: Get full metadata, AI abstract, sentiment, and OCR text for a specific article.

tools.name: semantic_search_articles
tools.description: Optional. Semantic similarity search over article OCR. Disabled by default — requires a free Google/Gemini API key.

tools.name: search_by_sentiment
tools.description: Filter articles by Gemini polarity and centrality labels.

tools.name: get_sentiment_distribution
tools.description: Aggregate Gemini sentiment stats across a filter set.

tools.name: search_index
tools.description: Search the authority index (persons, places, organisations, events, subjects).

tools.name: get_index_entry
tools.description: Get full details of an index entry.

tools.name: list_subjects
tools.description: List subject terms ranked by frequency.

tools.name: list_locations
tools.description: List locations from the index, ranked by frequency. The optional country filter selects places mentioned in that country's records (not places located there).

tools.name: list_persons
tools.description: List persons from the index, ranked by frequency. The optional country filter selects persons mentioned in that country's records.

tools.name: get_collection_stats
tools.description: Overall stats for all six IWAC subsets.

tools.name: get_newspaper_stats
tools.description: Per-newspaper article counts and date ranges.

tools.name: get_country_comparison
tools.description: Compare article counts and sentiment across countries.

tools.name: search_publications
tools.description: Search Islamic publications (periodical issues, books) by French keyword (title, subject, table of contents, OCR), series, subject, country, and year.

tools.name: list_periodicals
tools.description: List the periodical/series titles in the publications subset, with issue counts and year ranges.

tools.name: get_publication_fulltext
tools.description: Retrieve full OCR text of a publication, optionally with capped keyword excerpts.

tools.name: semantic_search_publications
tools.description: Optional. Semantic similarity search over publication tables of contents (17 of 25 series covered). Disabled by default — requires a free Google/Gemini API key.

tools.name: search_references
tools.description: Search multilingual academic references (journal articles, chapters, theses, books, reports) by title/abstract keyword, author, French metadata labels, country, language, and year; returns an abstract snippet.

tools.name: get_reference
tools.description: Get the full bibliographic record for a reference, including the complete abstract, DOI, subjects, and host-work details.

tools.name: search_documents
tools.description: Search the archival-documents subset with French keywords (association reports, flyers — mostly Burkina Faso).

tools.name: get_document
tools.description: Get full metadata, AI description, and OCR text for an archival document.

tools.name: search_audiovisual
tools.description: Search audiovisual materials by keyword and metadata (Nigeria; includes Hausa and Arabic recordings).

tools.name: get_audiovisual
tools.description: Get full metadata and media URL for a specific audiovisual record.

tools.name: list_audiovisual
tools.description: List audiovisual materials (Nigeria; includes Hausa and Arabic recordings).

cache_dir.title: Dataset cache directory
cache_dir.description: Where to store the downloaded IWAC parquet files (~250 MB on first run). Leave default to use your home directory.

semantic_search_enabled.title: Enable semantic search (optional)
semantic_search_enabled.description: Most users can leave this off. Enables two extra tools that find articles/publications by meaning rather than keywords. Requires a free Google/Gemini API key and uses network calls at query time. The other 22 tools work without this.

google_api_key.title: Google / Gemini API key
google_api_key.description: Required only if semantic search is enabled. Get a free key at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey.

embedding_model.title: Gemini embedding model
embedding_model.description: Model used to encode semantic-search queries. Must match the embeddings stored in the dataset.
